epigraph.quote: We saw a dove tree with white handkerchiefs.

per_stop.quote: Lots of water at different levels. Beech trees at the top of the valleys on the ridges.
supper in a car park, to hear Thomas play in Strauss' 1868-1946 "Metamorphoseus". Very sad.
The gardens are beautiful, but Simon thought the outer park landscape even more magnificent.
